violations.description: Toilet facilities. — --- Toilet & shower room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Parts of the ceiling above 3-Comp Sink is flaking. Ceiling and wall around fryer/grill in need of cleaning. - Ceiling above kitchen/prep areas need to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Currently popcorn type ceiling.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
